opinion.h2: NICHOLS v. McGEE, DIRECTOR, CALIFORNIA STATE DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF
opinion.p: No. 16, Misc. Decided October 12, 1959. Appeal dismissed.
Stanley Mosk, Attorney General of California, and Doris H. Maier, Deputy Attorney General, for appellees.
